title: Luffy Battles Cracker
description: On pages 3–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Sanji as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: Luffy fights one of Big Mom’s Sweet Commanders while the rescue mission grows more dangerous.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We lend our strength to the side who writes us the biggest check....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's all there really is to it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Welcome back,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ICHIJI and Niji.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One could say that broc coli was also...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One of the places that suffered greatly after Doflamingo's fall from power.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They'd lost their primary weapons manl- facturer in the midst of war...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They were so desperate in fact, they chose to end it rather than to letting their war drag out.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I think this is a good example of an instance where trying to keep everyone alive...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: would end up causing more casualties in the long run.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, we could've made an even greater profit...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That would make us no different than pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we had double dipped and taken up both sides!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At this very moment... we are still a nation officially registered as an affiliate of the world gov- ernment.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah, that reminds me, father ...the next 'reverie' is coming up!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well either way, in the not so distant future...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm guessing we'll be stripped of the right to participate in the reverie.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I hope you all are prepared for that moment...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Because when it happens, we germana... will be one step closer to our ultimate goal!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's rare to see father in such high spirits. To think that you, of all people...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: would actually be of use to us... never thought I'd see the day!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hold your head high, Sanji!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: man, all of us were a bit stunned when you up and vanished into thin air that day!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sure from time to time, we siblings would reminisce about you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The discussion almost exclusively revolved around all the amusing and humorous ways...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: for you to have died while being out there on your own!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: PFFFF!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Bwaaha Haha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yo, Niji.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: finish what's left on your plate.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Say what?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Oh, this?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't want it... I left it there intentionally.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I just had some of the most mouth-water- ing chocolate before our meal...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Besides, this weird potato sauce completely killed my appetite!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The consistency alone makes me want to puke...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So the only place it's going into will be the trash.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Eat. It.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're an ignorant, spoiled prince who doesn't know shit about the value of food!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What... What did you just say to me?! You...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you think you can away with talking to me in that tone?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Call the head chef!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Where the hell is costte?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What she thinks passes as 'food' made my brother ruin my good mood!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: My sincerest apologies!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I take full blame and responsibility for serving food that did not cater to Lord Niji's liking and...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Head chef cosmetic

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now then... don't you dare move a muscle, cosette!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Why you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You've totally lost your mind!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Are you trying to leave a scar...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: On this beautiful lady's face?!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 52 dialogue beats. Whole Cake Island becomes a hostile fairy-tale battlefield where Sanji’s rescue and Big Mom’s power are both unavoidable.
